parameters.query: SELECT id::text AS asset_id, domain, ai_extracted, ai_summary, mime, original_name FROM files.assets WHERE id = '{{$json.asset_id}}'::uuid LIMIT 1
SELECT id::text AS id FROM public.transactions WHERE id = '{{$json.transaction_id}}' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO public.transactions (id, account_id, posted_date, amount, description, memo, source) VALUES (  '{{$json.transaction_id}}',   '{{$json.account_id}}',   '{{$json.posted_date}}',   {{$json.amount}},   '{{($json.description || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}',   '{{($json.memo || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}}',   'email') ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Existence Branch').first().json;
return [{ json: ctx }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.transaction_files (transaction_id, asset_id, is_primary) VALUES ('{{$json.transaction_id}}', '{{$json.asset_id}}'::uuid, true) ON CONFLICT (transaction_id, asset_id) DO NOTHING
